g.text: FROM EVIDENCE TO A DEPLOYABLE ROLE MODEL

text.tspan: CONTROLLED INPUTS
Operating preferences · role contracts · real tasks
purpose-built fixtures · security and governance posture
EXECUTABLE CAPABILITY FAMILY
Concrete parent state · bounded accepted change
negative path · correction path · deterministic oracle
CAUSAL EXECUTION
Parent fails for the intended reason
accepted change passes · receipts bind the result
LINKED ROLE TRAJECTORY
Planner dispatch → Implementer action
execution receipt → Reviewer verdict
QUALIFICATION AND FREEZE
Family-disjoint splits · clean reproduction
independent review · frozen evaluation and recipe
VERSIONED TRAINING RUN
Pinned base model · train and validation only
resumable checkpoints · retained recipe and lineage
CONTROLLED EVALUATION
Compare base, instruction-file, tuned and governed conditions
measure role behaviour, coding quality, safety and task success
PROMOTE · RETUNE · REJECT
Only measured improvement is eligible for deployment
